originalTitle: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
content: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: A Star Sings for Unity in Ethiopia!
content:
Hello, Super Kids of Africa! It's your friendly news reporter here. Today, we have exciting news from a beautiful country called Ethiopia. It's about a very famous singer who wants everyone to be friends!

Meet Teddy Afro, the Music Star!

Imagine your favorite singer. Someone whose songs make you want to dance and sing along. In Ethiopia, a country with ancient stories and yummy coffee, there is a star named Teddy Afro. Teddy Afro is a super big musician. Many, many people in Ethiopia and all over the world love his music. He sings songs that have catchy tunes and important messages. He is known for his wonderful voice and his exciting rhythms. His concerts are always full of happy people. He is like a superhero with a microphone!

What is Unity? Let's Find Out!

Teddy Afro has a brand new song out! This song is special because it talks about something very important. It talks about 'unity'. What does unity mean? It means everyone coming together. It means being friends. It means helping each other and working together as one big team. Think about your classroom. When everyone plays nicely together, shares toys, and helps clean up, that's unity! When everyone works together for a school play, that's unity! It makes us stronger when we are united. Like how a lot of small sticks can break easily, but when you put them all together, they are very strong!

Teddy Afro's Special Song

In his new song, Teddy Afro is singing about how much he wishes for everyone in his country to be united. He is sharing his thoughts on how important it is for people to be friends and work together. He believes that when people are united, they can solve problems better. They can build a stronger, happier country for everyone, including all the children. His song is like a gentle reminder. It's like when your teacher reminds everyone to be kind to each other. Teddy Afro wants everyone to remember to be kind and work as a team. Songs are a powerful way to share feelings and ideas. When you sing, you can make people feel happy, or think about important things. Teddy Afro uses his music to do just that.

Millions Are Listening!

Guess what? Millions and millions of people have already listened to Teddy Afro’s new song! Can you imagine that many people? It's like if everyone in your town, and the next town, and the town after that, all listened to the same song at the same time! That's how popular he is. People listen on their radios, on their phones, and on computers. They share the song with their friends and family. The message of unity is spreading far and wide. They love the song because it has a great beat, but also because its message touches their hearts. They want unity too!

Did You Know? Fun Facts!

* **Did you know?** Ethiopia is one of the oldest countries in Africa! It has a history that goes back thousands of years. * **Did you know?** Ethiopia is famous for being the birthplace of coffee! So, every time you smell coffee, think of Ethiopia! * **Did you know?** Music is a language everyone understands! Even if you don't speak the same words, you can still enjoy the beat and the feeling of a song. * **Did you know?** Teddy Afro has many other famous songs that tell stories about Ethiopian history and culture.

Why Unity Matters for Everyone, Especially Kids!

Unity is not just for grown-ups. It's for kids too! When you play with your friends, sharing toys and taking turns, you are showing unity. When you help your brother or sister with their homework, that's unity. When everyone in your family works together to clean the house, that's unity! Being united makes life more fun and fair. It helps everyone feel safe and happy. When we are united, we can achieve amazing things together. So, even though Teddy Afro is singing to a whole country, his message is for all of us. It's about being good friends and good neighbours.

Let's Sing for Unity Together!

Teddy Afro’s song reminds us that working together makes us strong. It helps us build a better world, one friendship at a time. So next time you play with your friends, remember Teddy Afro’s song. Remember to be kind, share, and work together. That's how we build a strong, happy Africa! Keep singing, keep dancing, and keep spreading kindness! Bye for now!
summary: A very famous Ethiopian singer named Teddy Afro released a new song wishing for everyone in his country to be united and friendly.
whyMatters: This is important because when famous people talk about unity, it helps everyone think about being kind, sharing, and working together, which makes communities stronger and happier for kids and grown-ups alike.
